channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. Must Take Strong Action Against Huawei to Maintain AI Lead
item.description: The United States currently leads in AI, but that edge could vanish without decisive measures.

item.title: The Callousness of Abortion Pills
item.description: They represent a dangerous antithesis of good health care.

item.title: Thomas Massie Deserves to Lose
item.description: His districtâs voters should send the conspiracy theorist into retirement.

item.title: Terrorists Have Taken Over Iran â Now What?
item.description: Even countries that acknowledge the IRGC is a terrorist organization are looking away. This evasion has consequences.
